title: build: add support for `--inherit-annotations`
body:
Allows users to specify if they want to inherit annotations from base image or not.

Closes: https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/6153

comments.body: I need some changes from this PR https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6195 , so lets wait for https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6195
@flouthoc looks like #6195 has merged, is this one ready to move forward given that?
@TomSweeneyRedHat Yes this is ready for review. I already addressed @nalind 's comment in recent push.

> I'd expect one of our tests that runs both with and without --layers to use a Dockerfile that has more than one instruction after FROM. A build with only one instruction after the FROM doesn't give the test the ability to examine what happens in the intermediate images, to check that the annotations are dropped at the point that we want them to be and not somewhere else, or more than once, which could create unnecessary cache misses.

@nalind Done, extended both the tests to test with a new `Containerfile` with multiple instructions.
